articles.title: Meta's Smart Glasses Embed Face Recognition Code
articles.description: Meta has integrated face-recognition technology into its smart glasses app, now on millions of phones. This system identifies individuals using biometric data stored on devices.
articles.impact: This raises significant privacy concerns for users.

articles.title: Expert Tips for Capturing Northern Lights with Phone
articles.description: With strong northern lights expected, here's how to effectively photograph the aurora using your smartphone. Expert advice ensures you capture stunning images of this natural phenomenon.
articles.impact: This guide enhances your photography skills during auroras.

articles.title: Samsung Cuts Exynos 2600 Chip Usage Amid Price Hikes
articles.description: Samsung Mobile is scaling back the Exynos 2600 chip in the Galaxy Z Flip 8 due to soaring costs from Samsung LSI. The company is now relying more on Qualcomm for its upcoming devices.
articles.impact: This shift may affect Samsung's market competitiveness.

articles.title: Le Mans Ultimate Introduces 2026 Cars and Free DLC
articles.description: Le Mans Ultimate has released a free update featuring 2026-spec cars, including Toyota and BMW hypercars, and the first LMP3 outside paid DLC. Exciting new content for racing fans is now available.
articles.impact: This update enhances player engagement and excitement.
